title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.02 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.02 Game Version 1.02 date September 27, 2023 Summary A.K.I. Release. Bug fixes with some minor changes due to bugs Links Patch Notes A.K.I. Patch A.K.I. released Universal Changes Forward/Back Dash Input buffer window increased 4 → 7 frames (easier to get a dash with reversal timing) Super Arts Input recognition window reduced to 9 frames between inputs (less likely to come out accidentally) Drive Gain / Chip Damage vs. Burnout Several attacks unintentionally built less Drive gauge or did incorrect Chip damage when the opponent blocked while in Burnout and have been adjusted to the standard values Drive Impact Fixed issue where a DI Clash would occur in specific situations after an attack was absorbed by armor (canceling each other out) e.g. a cancelable poke is absorbed on the first DI armor frame and immediately canceled into a counter-DI Drive Parry Fixed issue where performing Parry from a crouching position would cost more Drive meter than from a standing position Also fixed issue where Dee Jay, E. Honda, Guile, Kimberly, Luke, Rashid, and Zangief would spend extra Drive meter to initiate a crouching Parry Perfect Parry Drive Gain when parrying multi-hit projectiles adjusted to prevent the defender from consuming more Drive meter than they spent Fixed an issue where inputting any upward direction after Perfect Parrying a projectile would buffer a jump input after the parry recovery ends Fixed an issue where after a jump normal was Perfect Parried, the timing to input an attack after landing was 1 frame later than usual Attacks hitting backwards Many attacks could unintentionally hit opponents behind the player and have been adjusted to only hit in front Assist Combos (Modern) Adjusted the timing that inputs are accepted and fixed buffer window issues Can no longer chain into a Light normal while holding the Assist button (allows Light Assist Combo to take priority) Key Character Changes Blanka 2HK Super Gain on Block decreased 600 → 500 (corrected to standard value) Rock Crusher (6MP) Super Gain on Block decreased 250,250 → 125,125 (corrected to standard value) Double Knee Bombs (6MK) Super Gain on Block decreased 250,250 → 125,125 (corrected to standard value) OD Aerial Rolling Attack (j.[4]6PP) Super Gain on Block for the 1st hit decreased 650 → 450 (corrected to standard value) OD Backstep Rolling Attack (63214KK) Increased opponent's Drive Gain on Parry 5000 → 10000 (1st attack) / 2500 → 5000 (2nd/3rd attacks) Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 5HK, 6MK, 63214KK (1st hit), [4]6LP (during SA2), SA3 Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 6MP, 6MK, 63214KK Cammy Lift Uppercut (4MP) Later active frames will no longer connect on crouch blocking opponents when timed meaty on the opponent's wakeup SA2 / Air SA2 (214214P Ground/Air) Decreased the Drive Damage on a cinematic hit 11000 → 10000 Increased the Drive Damage on the final non-cinematic airborne hit 3000 → 3700 (can now match the cinematic version if all hits connect) SA2 / Air SA2 / SA3/CA Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if a Super connected while their Drive gauge was full Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 6HK, 5HP~HK, 236P/PP~No Input, 236P/PP~2K Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 236HK/[HK]/KK, 236[HK]/KK~No Input, 236[HK]/KK~2K, SA1, SA2, Air SA2 Chun-Li Assist Combo 2 Fixed issue where after performing SA2, the next hit would not come out at if input at a specific timing j.HP Corrected the Counter-hit/Punish Counter damage vs. airborne opponents 960 → 600 (was using the damage value for grounded opponents) Lotus Punch (214P~HP) Removed unintended invincibility on head hurtbox on frames 3-28 2nd hit is now properly considered an overhead if the 1st hit whiffs OD Tenko Kicks (22KK) Fixed issue where Chun-Li would move after landing if the opponent switched sides on the 2nd hit of the attack SA1 (236236P) Fixed issue where only the final hit could KO against an airborne opponent SA3/CA (214214K) The distribution of the Drive Damage on Block has been adjusted SA3: 7500,0,0 → 6500,500,500 CA: 10000,0,0 → 9000,500,500 Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 236K/KK, 236KK~KK, 214K/KK, [2]8K/KK, SA3 Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout [2]8MK Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 214P~HP Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 2HP, 214P~2HP, 236K/KK, 236KK~KK, j.236K/KK, [2]8K/KK, Drive Reversal, SA1, Air SA1, SA2, SA3 Dee Jay Modern Controls Air Slasher shortcut ([4]S) will now only come out while still holding Back (4) or Up-Back (7) The short period where charge time is retained after letting go of the backward input no longer applies except when manually inputting Air Slasher This prevents overlap issues with Rolling Sobat and Jus Cool, as the Air Slasher would take priority for a short while after releasing charge Assist Combo 1 Fixed issue where Dee Jay could not perform 5LK > 236MK by inputting it as A[L] > 6S Assist Combo 3 Fixed issue where the 3rd hit of the combo would have extra damage scaling if input late Speedy Maracas (22P) Now in a Punish Counter state when transitioned into from Air Slasher (to avoid confusion when punishing the projectile) Can no longer transition from Air Slasher into Speedy Maracas when the projectile hits as a Counter-hit/Punish Counter, is parried, or is absorbed by armor Drive Reversal Updated the hurtbox to match the visuals more closely Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 5LK, 214P (1st hit), SA2, SA3 Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout 214P/PP, 236MK, 236HK, [2]8MK, [2]8HK Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 214K/KK~LK, 214K/KK~MK, Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 4HK, 236HK, 236KK, SA2 (M/H versions) Dhalsim 5MK Super Gain on Punish Counter decreased 700 → 500 (corrected to standard value) j.MK Corrected the tip of the hitbox so that it must be blocked as an Overhead instead of both Low / High j.HP Fixed issue where opponents in Burnout did not incur 4 extra frames of blockstun HP Yoga Flame (63214HP) Fixed issue where only 2 projectile clash hits would occur instead of 3 Yoga Arch (236K) Fixed issue where Starter / Combo Scaling would be applied when the stationary hitbox connected (after the projectile hits the ground) OD Yoga Comet (j.63214PP) Fixed issue where activating the move with plinked inputs (P~P) would prevent Dhalsim from using other airborne specials after recovery Aerial Yoga Teleport (4 or 6 + j.PPP/j.KKK) Fixed issue where Dhalsim would gain Super gauge when activated Fixed issue where the PPP version would take 1 frame longer to land than the KKK version if nothing was input mid-air SA2 (214214K) Fixed issue where the projectile became invisible if only the final hit did not connect Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 63214PP, Drive Reversal, SA1, SA2 E. Honda 5HP Fixed issue where Drive Rush + Sumo Spirit enhancement traveled a much farther distance than usual 2HP Fixed issue where Drive Rush + Sumo Spirit enhancement traveled a much shorter distance than usual Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 6HK, 3HK, 5MP~3HK, [2]8K/KK (2nd hit) Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 214P/PP, [4]6PP, 236K/KK~P, 236K/KK~2P, SA2, SA3 Guile 2LK Fixed issue where it could not be chain canceled when absorbed by armor Double Shot (2MP~2MP) Fixed issue where the extra Block Advantage vs. Burnout was +5 instead of +4 OD Sonic Cross (214PP) Decreased opponent's Drive Gain on Parry 5100 → 5000 SA1 ([4]646P) Decreased opponent's Drive Damage on Block 2520 → 2500 Fixed issue where HP version's projectile clash did not match the visuals SA3/CA ([4]646K) Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if SA3/CA connected while their Drive gauge was full Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain [2]8KK, SA1 Jamie Forward/Back Walk Fixed issue where Jamie would not move on the first frame during Drink Lv.4 Tensei Kick (2KK) Fixed issue where startup was 1 frame slower while SA2 Install is active Ransui Haze Drink (6HK~4HK~P Far) Fixed issue where Jamie's damage scaling would not increase properly when the drink occurs after SA2 Install runs out Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 5LK (chained), SA1, SA3 Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 2MK Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 5HP, 2HK, 6HK~4HK~P (Close), 236P (DL4), 236K, SA1, SA3 JP OD Embrace (214KK) Fixed issue where JP could move freely if the throw connected at the same time he was hit by a projectile HP Stribog (236HP, 1st hit) Fixed issue where JP would only gain half the usual amount of Drive Gauge on block when the opponent is in Burnout SA1 (236236P) When both hits are parried, Drive Gain on Parry distribution changed from 0,20000 → 10000,10000 SA2 (214214P) Fixed an issue where the final projectile would come out if JP was hit by an attack with short hitstun SA3/CA (236236K) Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if SA3/CA connected while their Drive gauge was full Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 5LK, 236P Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 236MK, 236HK, SA2 Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 6HK, SA1, SA2 Juri Modern Controls Fixed issue where performing 2L > Assist Combo 1 would result in a chained light normal during FSE (SA2 Install) Assist Combo 3 Fixed issue where the transition from OD Ankensatsu to OD Go Ohsatsu would cost 2 Drive bars instead of 1 FSE 6MK Fixed issue where Drive Gauge values were not scaled like other FSE-chained attacks Drive Gain on Hit 500 → 375 Drive Damage on Block 1250 → 625 Drive Damage on Punish Counter 2000 → 1250 Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind SA2 (initial hit) Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 5MK, 6HK, 4HK, 623P/PP, 236HK (1-stock), 236MKHK, SA1 Ken Drive Reversal Fixed issue where Ken's invincibility lasted longer on hit than other characters Run~Shoryuken (KK~623P) Super Gain on Block decreased 300 → 200 for the 1st/2nd hits (corrected to standard value) OD Hadoken (236PP) Drive Damage on Punish Counter adjusted 5000,0 → 2500,2500 Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind KK~HK, KK~214K (forward hitboxes), 236K/KK, 214MK, 214HK, 623K Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout 623LK Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout KK~MK, 236K/KK~6LK, 236K/KK~6MK Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 623MP/HP/PP, KK~623P, 214MK/HK/KK, KK~214K, SA2, SA3 Kimberly Bushin Prism Strikes 1 (5LP~MP) Super Gain on Block increased 150 → 200 (corrected to standard value) MP/HP/OD Vagabond Edge (236MP/HP/PP) Corrected the Drive Damage on Block 2000 → 4000 Super Arts (all) Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if a Super connected while their Drive gauge was full Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 236K/KK~MK, 236K/KK~HK Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain j.214K/KK, 236K/KK (Close), 236KK~LK, 236KK~MK, 236KK~HK Lily Prejump Frames Fixed issue where Lily could cancel prejump frames into special moves 1 frame longer than intended (except for 360+P command throws) SA2 / Air SA2 (236236K / j.236236K) Increased the Drive Gain on Parry for the Windclad versions to match the regular versions Expanded a combo-only hitbox upward for juggle consistency Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout j.2HP Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 2HP, 2HK, 623PP, W.623P/PP, j.PPP, W.j.PP/PPP, SA1, SA2, Air SA2 Luke OD No Chaser (236KK~P) Super Gain on Block increased 500 → 600 (corrected to standard value) Drive Impact Fixed issue that would cause the opponent to take no damage when being hit in certain circumstances Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout pf.214[LP] (2nd hit) Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout pf.214[LP] (2nd hit), 236PP~PP Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 214[P] (Perfect/non-Perfect), 623PP, SA1, SA2 Manon Drive Impact Fixed issue where DI Clash would occur even if activated 1 frame later than the opponent Rond-point (236K) HK version 2nd hit Punish Counter damage corrected 600 → 480 HK/OD version 2nd hit recovery no longer cancelable early on block OD Renversé (236PP) Fixed issue where recovery was 1 frame slower at Medal Lv.3 or Lv.4 SA1 (236236K) Fixed issue where Manon could pass through some moves while both are active Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 5LK, SA3 Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout SA1 Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain 214LK, 214MK, 236K, SA2 Marisa Modern Controls Fixed issue where normals could not be canceled into Gladius using 6S input 6S is normally Scutum (214K) which cannot be canceled into from normals, so the 6S acts like a 5S in this context Caelum Arc (nj.2HP) Fixed issue where the recovery was much longer if it connected as a cross-up; Hit Recovery 27 → 19; Block Recovery 23 → 15 Fixed issue where the opponent would turn the wrong way if blocked cross-up during Burnout Fixed issue where the landing recovery could be canceled into with another move Dimachaerus (214P) Fixed issue where Super Gain on Block was not half of the standard Hit value Held SA1 (236236[P]) Fixed issue where the damage increased on Counter-hit/Punish Counter on active frames 5-6 Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 236P, 623P, 236K Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 2HK, 2[HK], j.[HP], j.[HK], nj.2[HP], 6MP~HP Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain SA2 Rashid Forward Dash Adjusted the beginning of the animation to be more visually apparent Fixed issue where the total dash duration would change depending on how the move was input Fixed issue where Rashid could not input a Throw Escape after the dash recovery frames had ended Air Throw (j.LPLK) Drive Gain on Hit increased 1600 → 2000 Enhanced Tempest Moon (6[6]~6K Air) Drive Gain on Parry adjusted 10000,5000,5000 → 5000,2500,2500 Previously would build 2 bars for the opponent instead of the standard 1 bar Drive Impact Fixed issue that would cause the opponent to take no damage when being hit in certain circumstances Enhanced LP Spinning Mixer (236LP Air) Drive Gain on Block adjusted 2000 → 900 to match the value on Hit Enhanced MP Spinning Mixer (236MP Air) Damage on Punish Counter corrected to the standard +20% bonus: 2880 (360x2,240x8,240) → 1680 (240x2,120x8,240) Drive Gain on Punish Counter corrected to match the value on Hit: 0x2,200x8,200 → 150x10,500 Enhanced OD Spinning Mixer (236PP Air) Damage on Punish Counter corrected to the standard +20% bonus: 2880 (360x2,240x8,240) → 1680 (240x2,120x8,240) Super Gain on Punish Counter for 3rd hit adjusted 100 → 50 (corrected to standard value) Drive Gain on Parry 12000 → 10000 Fixed issue where Rashid would gain Drive meter on Punish Counter from the 4th hit onward Enhanced OD Eagle Spike (214KK Air) Fixed issue where Rashid would whiff through a grounded character if SA2 was placed behind the opponent OD Arabian Skyhigh (j.214KK) Fixed issue where Rashid would gain Drive meter when blocked Super Gain on Block (corrected to be 1/2 the standard value on Hit) 6MP, 6[6]~6K, Enhanced 236LP/HP, Enhanced 236MP (vs. stand block), 214MK/HK, 214KK (vs. Burnout), Enhanced 214MK/HK, 214P, 214P/PP~6K~K, j.214K/KK Universal Adjustments - Chip Damage vs. Burnout Enhanced 236HP, Enhanced 236PP, 236[MK] (1st hit), 214PP, 214P/PP~6K~K, j.214K Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain j.HP, 6MP, 6[6]~6K, 236LP/MP/PP, 214P/PP, SA2 Ryu 2HP Fixed issue where Ryu would move backwards if the 2nd active frame connected on hit Fuwa Triple Strike (5MP~LK~HK) Fixed issue where 2nd hit would increase the opponent's Drive gauge on Punish Counter; now decreases it by 2000 instead 3rd hit Drive Damage on Punish Counter increased 0 → 10000 High Double Strike (5HP~HK) 2nd hit Drive Damage on Punish Counter increased 0 → 10000 SA2 Lv.2/3 (214214[P]) Hitbox expanded inwards; collision box expanded upwards from button release until the end of active frames Only applies mid-combo to prevent the attack from whiffing under an opponent Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 5LK, 5MP~LK, SA3 (final hit) Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout j.MP (2nd hit), 6MP (2nd hit) Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain j.MP, 6MP, 6HP, 4HK, 623P, 214MK/HK/KK, SA1, SA3 Zangief Smetana Dropkick (3HK) Drive Damage on Block increased 3000 → 6000 Borscht Dynamite (j.360+K) Input Recognition Time: 20f → 12f (less likely to come out accidentally mid-air) Super Gain on Punish Counter increased by 150 (corrected to match the standard value) OD Double Lariat (PPP) Super Gain on Hit decreased 300 → 250 (2nd hit onward) SA1 (236236K) Fixed issue where Drive Damage on Hit was 60 less when input with Modern shortcut Fixed issue where a stunned opponent would recover from Burnout mid-combo if SA1 connected while their Drive gauge was full SA2 (236236P) 2nd hit onward: expanded the collision box and hitboxes vertically on a successful hit to prevent a juggle from dropping Fixed issue where the suction effect would persist when interrupted on startup Universal Adjustments - Attacks Hitting Behind 5LK Universal Adjustments - Drive Gain vs. Burnout 2MK, 3HK Universal Adjustments - Perfect Parry Drive Gain PP/PPP, SA2

Modern Controls
  • Air Slasher shortcut ([4]S) will now only come out while still holding Back (4) or Up-Back (7)
  • The short period where charge time is retained after letting go of the backward input no longer applies except when manually inputting Air Slasher
  • This prevents overlap issues with Rolling Sobat and Jus Cool, as the Air Slasher would take priority for a short while after releasing charge
